name: future_self_demo
base_prompt: The man from the reference photo talks directly to the camera, casual handheld selfie video, eye-level medium close-up
wardrobe: wearing a white ribbed tank top with a small black clip-on lav microphone on his chest

P.room: plain room with a green wall

shots.line: I'm the version that didn't do peptides. Trust me.
shots.delivery: older, balding, gaunt and tired, raspy
shots.label: Unoptimized Version

shots.line: The government is trying to kill you.
Oh, shut up. Do the peptides. Definitely do the peptides.
shots.label: Optimized Version

shots.delivery: confused, turning to look, hands free

shots.line: I'm the version of you that continued to optimize. And honestly, we just kept getting younger, more jacked, and rich.
I mean, that does sound pretty awesome. And this guy looks like shit.
Okay, so you're telling me nothing goes wrong with this whole peptide thing?
Oh no, tons of stuff goes wrong. Just not for us.
Because we never took any of the contaminated cheap stuff.
